case_title: LUIS HUMBERTO MARENGO VS. AEROVIAS DE MEXICO S.A.DE C.V.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $635.00 FILED BY MARENGO, LUIS HUMBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DE MEXICO S.A.DE C.V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-25-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DE MEXICO S.A.DE C.V.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DE MEXICO S.A.DE C.V.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY YADIRA MARTINEZ--DUTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARENGO, LUIS HUMBERTO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DE MEXICO S.A.DE C.V. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
